---
title: "Workflow Peptide: Save"
abstract: >
  The page describe the Save step of the Peptide Worflow.

output:
    BiocStyle::html_document:
        highlight: tango
        toc: false
        number_sections: FALSE
date: 16 March 2026
link-citations: true
---

# Save

The `Save` step is the last step of the workflow. It allows to save the final dataset. 

***

### Save

Click on `Run` on the left side to validate the step. 
The final dataset can be downloaded through the `xlsx` or `qf` button, depending on the desired file type.
It is possible to visualize the imputed data, as well as viewing all informations related to any previous step, by clicking the `EDA` button on the right side of the timeline.
